zh.Lanherne, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾藍黑爾
zh.lifeSummary: Joanna Lansladrou於1278年出生在英國可瓦爾。她與John de Lambourne在英國英格蘭可瓦爾藍黑爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1301年在英國可瓦爾藍黑爾享年23歲。

zh-hans.Lanherne, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾藍黑爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joanna Lansladrou于1278年出生在英国可瓦爾。她与John de Lambourne在英国英格兰可瓦爾藍黑爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1301年在英国可瓦爾藍黑爾享年23岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Joanna Lansladrou was born in 1278, in Cornwall, England. She married John de Lambourne in Lanherne, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1301, in Lanherne, Cornwall, England, at the age of 23.

fr.lifeSummary: Joanna Lansladrou est née en 1278, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John de Lambourne à Lanherne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1301, à Lanherne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 23 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joanna Lansladrou wurde 1278 in Cornwall, England geboren. Sie hat in Lanherne, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom John de Lambourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1301 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Lanherne, Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Joanna Lansladrou è nata il nel 1278 nel Cornwall, England. Lei sposato John de Lambourne nel Lanherne, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1301, nel Lanherne, Cornwall, England, all'età di 23 anni.

ja.Lanherne, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルランハーン
ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Lansladrouは1278年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた。イギリスイギリスコルンワルランハーンでJohn de Lambourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1301年にイギリスコルンワルランハーンで23歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Lansladrou(은)는 1278년 영국 코른월에서 태어났다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 랜헤른에서 John de Lambourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 영국 코른월 랜헤른에서 23세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Lanherne, Cornwall, England: Lanherne, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Joanna Lansladrou nasceu em 1278, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John de Lambourne em Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1301, em Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 23 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joanna Lansladrou родилась в 1278 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Lambourne в местности ланирн, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1301 г. в местности ланирн, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 23 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Joanna Lansladrou nació en 1278, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Se casó con John de Lambourne en Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1301, en Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 23 años.
